name: test_copy_message_to_clipboard
description:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

        Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
        the copied content matches the actual message text.
descriptionHtml:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

    Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
    the copied content matches the actual message text.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
  Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy or work with. Could you...
  Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy or work with. Could you...
assert "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy or work with. Could you please provide:\n\n1. The message or text you want me to copy, or\n2. Details about what you'd like me to do\n\nFor example, you might want me to:\nCopy text from a file\nHelp format a message\nExtract specific content\nCreate a new file with certain content\n\nPlease share the message or clarify your request, and I'll assist you right away!" == "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy or work with. Could you please provide:\nThe message or text you want me to copy, or\nDetails about what you'd like me to do\nFor example, you might want me to:\nCopy text from a file\nHelp format a message\nExtract specific content\nCreate a new file with certain content\nPlease share the message or clarify your request, and I'll assist you right away!"
  
    I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy or work with. Could you please provide:
  + 
  - The message or text you want me to copy, or
  + 1. The message or text you want me to copy, or
  ? +++
  - Details about what you'd like me to do
  + 2. Details about what you'd like me to do
  ? +++
  + 
    For example, you might want me to:
    Copy text from a file
    Help format a message
    Extract specific content
    Create a new file with certain content
  + 
    Please share the message or clarify your request, and I'll assist you right away!
statusTrace:
tests/ui/chat/test_chat_interface.py:213: in test_copy_message_to_clipboard
    assert _strip_markdown(clipboard_text) == ai_response_text.strip(), (
E   AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
E     Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy or work with. Could you...
E     Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy or work with. Could you...

Details about what you'd like me to do\n\nFor example, you might want me to:\nCopy text from a file\nHelp format a message\nExtract specific content\nCreate a new file with certain content\n\nPlease share the message or clarify your request, and I'll assist you right away!" == "I'm ready to help! Could you please provide:\nThe message or text you want me to copy, or\nDetails about what you'd like me to do\nFor example, you might want me to:\nCopy text from a file\nHelp format a message\nExtract specific content\nCreate a new file with certain content\nPlease share the message or clarify your request, and I'll assist you right away!"
E     
E       I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy or work with. Could you please provide:
